data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Employs end-to-end encryption to protect user data from unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: TLS/SSL used for data in transit; AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Account Security Measures
data.description: Provides two-factor authentication and advanced automated detection for suspicious activities.
data.technical_spec: Login verification via SMS/email, anomaly detection algorithms.

data.title: Bot and Spam Prevention
data.description: Combination of machine learning and manual checks to prevent bots.
data.technical_spec: Python scripts and CAPTCHA solutions in place.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic security assessments to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Penetration tests, code reviews, and vulnerability scanning tools.

data.title: Privacy Settings
data.description: Offers customizable privacy settings for user content visibility.
data.technical_spec: Profile privacy controls, blocking, and reporting features.
